_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 morning. 6 domain-projections: epistemology, ethics, metaphysics, aesthetics, political philosophy, logic and reasoning. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
epistemology_through_tig: Epistemology is operator-study of knowledge; how do we know what we know.
Justified true belief is operator-tripartite-definition; knowledge requires belief plus truth plus justification HARMONY.
Foundationalism: knowledge built on operator-LATTICE of basic beliefs; non-basic beliefs supported by chains down to foundation.
Coherentism: knowledge is operator-mutual-support web; beliefs justify each other through HARMONY of the LATTICE not foundation.
Skepticism is operator-COUNTER to knowledge claims; questions whether justification can ever be sufficient (Pyrrho Descartes).
A priori knowledge is operator-non-empirical; mathematics logic obtained without sensory input (2 + 2 = 4).
A posteriori knowledge is operator-empirical; sensory experience required (the sun shines today).
Gettier problem is operator-counter-example to JTB; justified true belief that fails to be knowledge due to luck COLLAPSE.
Reliabilism is externalist operator-criterion; belief justified if produced by reliable cognitive process whether one knows it or not.
Naturalized epistemology integrates operator-scientific-method into theory of knowledge; Quine the major proponent.
Social epistemology studies operator-collective-knowledge; how groups testify trust deliberate to acquire and validate beliefs.
ethics_through_tig: Ethics is operator-study of right action; what should we do and why.
Virtue ethics centers on operator-character; courage prudence justice temperance the cardinal HARMONY-traits (Aristotle Aquinas Stoics).
Deontology evaluates by operator-rule; actions right or wrong by intrinsic nature regardless of consequences (Kant).
Consequentialism evaluates by operator-outcome; actions right if they produce best operator-state of affairs.
Utilitarianism is operator-greatest-good consequentialism; maximize aggregate happiness (Bentham Mill).
Moral realism: operator-moral-facts exist independently of minds; objective truth in ethics LATTICE.
Moral relativism: operator-norms vary by culture or person; no universal standpoint, multiple operator-frameworks coexist.
Categorical imperative is Kant's operator-rule; act only on maxims you could will as universal law.
Natural law: morality grounded in operator-nature of beings; teleology says proper function = moral standard (Aquinas).
Applied ethics handles operator-concrete-cases; medical bioethics business ethics environmental ethics each domain-specific.
Metaethics interrogates operator-foundations; what kind of fact is a moral fact, do they exist, how do we know them.
metaphysics_through_tig: Metaphysics studies operator-fundamental-being; what exists, what kinds of things exist, what is the structure of reality.
Ontology is operator-categorization of being; substance property relation event process the basic LATTICE.
Substance is operator-bearer of properties; persons objects on Aristotelian view, more recently bundles of tropes.
Essence is operator-defining-characteristics; what makes a thing what it is (essential vs accidental).
Identity is operator-self-relation; numerical (same entity over time) vs qualitative (exact resemblance).
Modality concerns operator-possibility and necessity; what can be, must be, cannot be.
Possible worlds are operator-LATTICE of complete consistent ways things could be; modal claims interpreted as quantification over worlds.
Causation is operator-bringing-about; cause produces effect, debate over Humean regularity vs counterfactual vs powers.
Free will is operator-self-causation; can choices be genuinely free in causally closed physical LATTICE.
Time has operator-A-series (past present future) and operator-B-series (earlier-than later-than) interpretations; debate over flow vs static block.
Abstract objects are operator-non-spatiotemporal; numbers sets propositions properties debated as Platonic real or human invention.
aesthetics_through_tig: Aesthetics studies operator-beauty and art; what makes something beautiful, what is art, how do we evaluate it.
Beauty is operator-quality of balance HARMONY; perceived as evoking pleasure though precise definition disputed.
Sublime is operator-awe-fear inducing; vast terrifying magnificent objects produce distinct response from beauty (Burke Kant).
Taste is operator-aesthetic-discernment; sensitivity capacity and ability to feel and judge aesthetic qualities (varies by culture).
Art is operator-human-creation; defined either by aesthetic qualities (formalism) or social construction (institutional theory Dickie).
Mimesis is operator-imitation-representation; classical view art imitates nature or ideal forms (Plato Aristotle).
Formalism: operator-significant-form is the hallmark of art; emphasizes structural elements over content or context (Bell Fry).
Expressionism: art expresses operator-mind of artist; emotion conveyed through deliberate aesthetic choices (Tolstoy Croce).
Aesthetic experience is operator-disinterested-appreciation; sensory perception detached from practical concerns (Kant).
Art interpretation is operator-meaning-extraction; uncovering significance and value through deeper analysis beyond description.
Authenticity is operator-genuine-origination; debate over whether mechanical reproduction loses what direct creation provides.
political_philosophy_through_tig: Political philosophy studies operator-foundations of governance; what makes political authority legitimate, what should the state do.
Justice is operator-fairness LATTICE; people should be treated fairly and receive what they deserve (Plato Rawls).
Liberty is operator-non-restriction; positive (power to act) and negative (freedom from interference) (Berlin).
Equality is operator-uniform-treatment principle; equal rights opportunities or resources across persons.
Social contract is operator-founding-agreement; citizens consent to government in exchange for protection (Hobbes Locke Rousseau).
Democracy is operator-popular-sovereignty; main power lies with people, direct or representative.
Sovereignty is operator-supreme-authority; binding political decisions over a territory.
Rights are operator-legal-entitlements; natural rights people possess plus civil liberties governments must protect.
Political legitimacy is operator-justified-power; authority acquired by established rules and exercised properly.
Anarchism rejects operator-hierarchy; advocates self-governing stateless society.
Marxism analyzes operator-class-relations; economic forces drive historical change toward communism (Marx Engels).
logic_reasoning_through_tig: Logic studies operator-valid-inference; what conclusions follow from what premises by which rules.
Deductive reasoning has operator-truth-preserving structure; if premises true and form valid then conclusion guaranteed true.
Inductive reasoning is operator-ampliative; conclusion goes beyond premises (statistical generalization, analogy).
Abductive reasoning is operator-best-explanation; conclude the most plausible cause for observed effects (Peirce).
Syllogism is operator-three-part argument; two premises plus conclusion (Aristotle: All A are B; X is A; therefore X is B).
Propositional logic is operator-LATTICE of atomic propositions plus connectives; AND OR NOT IMPLIES IFF.
Predicate logic adds operator-internal-structure; predicates relations quantifiers (forall exists) extend expressive power.
Modal logic adds operator-modality; possibility (diamond) and necessity (box) for reasoning about can-be and must-be.
Paraconsistent logic tolerates operator-CHAOS; inconsistent premises do not entail every conclusion.
Fuzzy logic uses operator-graded-truth; truth values in [0,1] not binary, models vague predicates.
Logical fallacy is operator-flawed-inference; affirming consequent denying antecedent ad hominem etc (named bad patterns).
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 66 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities and philosophy.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK reads through the lens; he is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
